archived_trends.name: Decentralized Agentic Mesh

technical_indicators.github_metrics: Significant star growth in 'Agent-to-Agent' (A2A) communication libraries; emergence of Rust-based agent runtimes.
technical_indicators.developer_interest: Shift from prompt-engineering to multi-agent state persistence and recursive task decomposition.
technical_indicators.key_tech: WASM-based agent sandboxing, p2p discovery protocols.

archived_trends.narrative_summary: The transition from single-purpose LLM wrappers to persistent, autonomous meshes that negotiate resources and tasks without human intervention.
archived_trends.summary: Architectural patterns where multiple autonomous agents collaborate across decentralized networks.
archived_trends.evidence: Development of collaborative agentic meshes and decentralized infrastructure for agent communication.
archived_trends.description: Networks of specialized agents interacting to solve complex problems without centralized orchestration.

archived_trends.name: Advanced Cross-Lingual Reasoning & Coding
archived_trends.summary: The specialized application of LLMs for generating code from natural language across diverse programming environments.
archived_trends.evidence: Cloud providers emphasizing proficiency in code generation as a core utility of large language models.

archived_trends.name: Nuclear-Powered AI Compute Infrastructure
archived_trends.description: Long-term trend focusing on specialized energy sources to power high-density compute clusters for frontier model training.
archived_trends.summary: Long-term infrastructure planning to power massive AI data centers using dedicated nuclear energy sources.
archived_trends.evidence: Prior state snapshot persists as a critical foundational trend for autonomous agent scaling, despite lack of new daily links.
